title: Verify navigation drawer opens and closes
test_steps: Tap on the circular profile icon at the top of the screen to open the navigation drawer. | Verify the navigation drawer list is displayed. | Tap on the circular profile icon again to close the navigation drawer. | Verify the navigation drawer is closed.
expected_result: The navigation drawer should open and display the list of options. | The navigation drawer should close when the circular profile icon is tapped again.

title: Verify navigation drawer options are clickable
test_steps: Tap on the 'Home' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'Post' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'My Messages' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'My Ads' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'Browse' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'Favorites' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'Saved Searches' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'Settings' option in the navigation drawer. | Tap on the 'About' option in the navigation drawer.
expected_result: Navigating to each option should take the user to the corresponding section of the app.

title: Verify email address is displayed in the header
test_steps: Verify the email address 'appcrawler1@gmail.com' is displayed in the header.
expected_result: The email address 'appcrawler1@gmail.com' should be displayed in the header.

title: Verify the main content area displays items for sale
test_steps: Verify the main content area displays images of items for sale, such as a motorcycle and a birdcage.
expected_result: The main content area should display images of items for sale.
